headline: A Look At Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) Valuation After Japan’s Approval Of Dupixent For Bullous Pemphigoid
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) is back in focus after Japan approved Dupixent as the first targeted treatment for adults with moderate to severe bullous pemphigoid, expanding the drug’s reach in a rare skin disease. See our latest analysis for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals. The Dupixent approval in Japan has arrived while Regeneron’s 1 day share price return of 1.57% and 7 day share price return of 1.73% contrast with a 30 day share price decline of 4.14%, and a 1 year total shareholder return...
